title: AI Study Companion
summary: An AI-powered learning assistant that helps students upload notes, ask questions, generate summaries, and prepare for exams.
overview: A complete final year project package with modern UI, AI chatbot flow, document summarization, dashboard analytics, and presentation-ready documentation.
problem: Students need a project that feels modern, useful, demo-friendly, and easy to explain during viva.
solution: A clean AI study platform with note uploads, intelligent Q&A, flashcard generation, progress tracking, and admin-ready project documentation.
